note: golden_hash is empty until first `node golden-parity.test.mjs --update`.

protocol_scores.name: ACP (Agent Commerce Protocol / AP2)
protocol_scores.label: recommended
protocol_scores.bestFor: AI-native merchants, ChatGPT / Gemini checkout integration, structured mandate flows
protocol_scores.notFor: Merchants with no AI agent traffic or no API integration capability

protocol_scores.name: UCP (Universal Checkout Protocol)
protocol_scores.label: recommended
protocol_scores.bestFor: Platform merchants, broad agent interop, standardized checkout across agent surfaces
protocol_scores.notFor: Micropayments < $1, custom API-only merchants needing sub-cent settlement

protocol_scores.name: x402 (HTTP 402 Micropayment Protocol)
protocol_scores.label: viable
protocol_scores.bestFor: API/content micropayments, per-call AI agent billing, developer tools, sub-$10 transactions
protocol_scores.notFor: Consumer checkout flows, merchants needing fiat settlement, high-AOV merchandise

protocol_scores.name: Visa TAP / VIC (Trusted Agent Protocol)
protocol_scores.label: viable
protocol_scores.bestFor: Card-first merchants, backward compat with existing Visa acquiring, high-value B2C/B2B
protocol_scores.notFor: Crypto-native merchants, micropayments, merchants without Visa acquiring
